exposedApi.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to access the Northwind Employee Portal API on behalf of the signed-in user
exposedApi.userConsentDescription: Access the Northwind Employee Portal on your behalf

notes: Authorization code flow with PKCE for SPA. Run Configure-LabOidcApps.ps1 after Configure-LabApps.ps1 to apply redirect URIs, optional claims, and exposed API scope.
entraFreeNotes: Group-to-role assignments require P1+ in portal; Configure-LabApps.ps1 assigns roles via Graph on Free tier. Admin consent for api://northwind-portal/access can be granted in Enterprise applications > Permissions.
